notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Geraldo Perdomo rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Geraldo Perdomo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
